seo_data.generated_keywords: POCO M7, Snapdragon 685, 7000mAh battery, 144Hz display, 50MP camera, 33W charging, 18W reverse charging, FHD+ display, smartphone, Xiaomi HyperOS, Hi-Res Audio, Dolby Atmos, IP64, NFC
seo_data.meta_title: POCO M7: Massive 7000mAh Battery, 144Hz FHD+ Display, Snapdragon 685
seo_data.meta_description: Experience the POCO M7 with its massive 7000mAh battery, immersive 6.9" FHD+ 144Hz display, powerful Snapdragon 685, and 50MP AI dual camera.
seo_data.seo_long_description:
The POCO M7 redefines smartphone endurance and visual fidelity, featuring a massive 7000mAh (typ) battery, the largest ever for POCO's global market range, ensuring extended usage for video playback, reading, and calls. Its immersive 6.9-inch FHD+ DotDisplay boasts a 144Hz AdaptiveSync refresh rate and 2340 x 1080 resolution, delivering vibrant colors and a smooth visual experience. Powering this device is the efficient Snapdragon® 685 4G Mobile Platform, built on a 6nm process, with an octa-core CPU reaching up to 2.8GHz, complemented by up to 16GB RAM with memory extension for seamless multitasking.

Beyond raw power, the POCO M7 integrates a clear 50MP AI dual camera system for detailed photography and an 8MP front camera for selfies and video calls. Charging is rapid with 33W turbo charging, and the device uniquely offers 18W reverse charging, allowing it to double as a portable power bank. Designed for comfort with a quad-curved body and enhanced durability with IP64 water and dust resistance, it also includes multiple eye-care certifications (TÜV Rheinland Low Blue Light, Flicker Free, Circadian Friendly) and Wet touch technology 2.0 for responsive interaction even with wet fingers. Audio experiences are elevated with Hi-Res Audio and Dolby Atmos® support, all running on the intelligent Xiaomi HyperOS 2.

range_overview:
The POCO M7 is engineered to deliver an exceptional smartphone experience, balancing long-lasting power, immersive visuals, and robust performance. It is distinguished by its massive 7000mAh (typ) battery, which provides ultra-long battery life, capable of up to 2.32 days of light daily use. This includes an impressive 28 hours of video playback and 46 hours of calling. The battery's resilience is further enhanced by a BatteryExtender Chip, maintaining strong performance even at -20℃, and is engineered to retain 80% capacity after 1,600 charge cycles. Charging is efficient with 33W turbo charging support, and the innovative 18W reverse charging feature allows the POCO M7 to act as a portable power bank, extending the utility of other devices.

Visuals come alive on the immersive 6.9-inch FHD+ DotDisplay, offering a resolution of 2340 x 1080 and a 144Hz AdaptiveSync refresh rate that intelligently adapts across 9 levels for optimized viewing comfort. The display also features a high 288Hz touch sampling rate and 700 nits (typ) brightness, peaking at 850 nits (HBM). Eye comfort is prioritized with TÜV Rheinland Low Blue Light (Software Solution), Flicker Free, and Circadian Friendly certifications, alongside DC dimming. Innovative Wet touch technology 2.0 ensures accurate screen response even with wet or oily fingers. Performance is driven by the powerful Snapdragon® 685 4G Mobile Platform, built on an efficient 6nm process, featuring an octa-core Qualcomm® Kryo™ CPU clocked up to 2.8GHz and a Qualcomm® Adreno™ GPU. It supports up to 16GB RAM with memory extension and offers flexible storage options from 128GB to 256GB, expandable up to 2TB via microSD.

Photography is handled by a clear 50MP AI dual camera system with an f/1.8 aperture and 5P lens, supporting various modes like Film Camera, HDR, Night mode, Portrait mode, and Time-lapse. The front features an 8MP camera with an f/2 aperture, also supporting Film Camera, HDR, Soft-light ring, Portrait mode, and Time-lapse. Security is robust with a side fingerprint sensor and AI face unlock. Connectivity is comprehensive, including SIM1 + Hybrid (SIM or microSD), extensive 2G/3G/4G LTE band support, Wi-Fi 2.4GHz | 5GHz, Bluetooth 5.0, and NFC. Navigation is precise with GPS, Glonass, Galileo, and Beidou. The device boasts Hi-Res Audio and Dolby Atmos® for an enhanced sound experience. Its durability is rated IP64 for water and dust resistance, and it runs on Xiaomi HyperOS 2, promising a smooth 48-month like-new software experience.
sales_arguments: Massive 7000mAh (typ) battery for ultra-long endurance, featuring low-temperature resistance and 1,600 charge cycles for longevity.
Immersive 6.9-inch FHD+ DotDisplay with 144Hz AdaptiveSync refresh rate and multiple eye-care certifications (TÜV Rheinland Low Blue Light, Flicker Free, Circadian Friendly).
Powerful Snapdragon® 685 4G Mobile Platform (6nm) delivering stable performance with improved efficiency and lower power consumption.
Versatile camera system with a clear 50MP AI dual main camera and an 8MP front camera, supporting various creative photography modes.
Efficient 33W turbo charging for rapid power-ups and convenient 18W reverse charging, allowing the device to function as a portable power bank.
Supports up to 16GB RAM with memory extension and expandable storage up to 2TB for extensive multitasking and media storage.
Enhanced durability with IP64 water and dust resistance, coupled with Wet touch technology 2.0 for accurate screen response in challenging conditions.
Premium audio experience featuring Hi-Res Audio and Dolby Atmos® support.

technical_specifications.Processor: Snapdragon® 685 4G Mobile Platform (6nm process, Octa-core CPU up to 2.8GHz, Qualcomm® Adreno™ GPU)
technical_specifications.Rear Camera: 50MP main camera, f/1.8, 5P lens (AI dual camera)
technical_specifications.Sensors: Side fingerprint sensor, AI face unlock, Virtual proximity sensor, Ambient light sensor, Accelerometer, Electronic compass, IR blaster
